untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of trendline intersections and channel boundaries which are not available as direct indicators. The rule relies on subjective visual identification of 'reference points' (swing highs, previous resistance, channel boundaries) that must be manually defined or computed externally. Risk-reward threshold multiplier is unspecified ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). ATR multiplier for stop loss is unspecified ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). Substituted Donchian channels as a proxy for channel boundaries, but true trendline logic cannot be captured with available indicators.
translation_notes: Signal is highly context-dependent and requires manual trendline/channel identification. Used dc_upper and dc_lower (20-period Donchian) as a partial proxy for channel boundaries. Original signal calls for position reduction on breakouts beyond reference points with logical stops at swing highs or previous resistance levels. Parameters like ATR multiplier and risk-reward ratio minimum must be specified by trader. Confirmation_candles parameter (1) suggests immediate entry on breakout close.
